# pheno-agents-md

> AI-agent context (AGENTS.md) generation rules + template for the Phenotype fleet. Renders the 60-100 line 'agent constitution' for any repo from a small YAML config.

## Quickstart

```toml
# Cargo.toml
[dependencies]
pheno-agents-md = "0.1"
```

```bash
# install the CLI
cargo install pheno-agents-md
# generate AGENTS.md from pheno-agents-md.yaml
pheno-agents-md --out ./AGENTS.md
```

## Public API

```rust
pheno_agents_md::AgentConfig { build, test, lint, audit, sign, repo_name, extra_dont_touch }
pheno_agents_md::render(&cfg, default_repo_name) -> String
pheno_agents_md::load_config(&Path) -> Result<AgentConfig>
pheno_agents_md::write_agents_md(&cfg, &str, &Path) -> Result<()>
```

## Files

- `Cargo.toml`
- `README.md`
- `src/lib.rs`
- `src/main.rs`
- `src/pheno_agents_md/`
- `tests/`
- `AGENTS.md`
- `llms.txt`
- `WORKLOG.md`
- `CHANGELOG.md`
- `LICENSE-MIT`
- `.github/workflows/ci.yml`

## Conventions

- Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, `docs:`, `refactor:`).
- rustfmt + clippy (`-D warnings`); `#![warn(missing_docs)]` on the
  public API.
- 80% lib coverage gate (ADR-023 Rule 3.1); see `coverage` job in
  `.github/workflows/ci.yml`.
- Standalone crate (empty `[workspace]` table in `Cargo.toml`); not
  a member of the root monorepo workspace.
- WORKLOG.md is the change history (v2.1 schema, 7 cols + `device`).

## See also

- `AGENTS.md` — agent context.
- `WORKLOG.md` — change history (v2.1 schema).
- `CHANGELOG.md` — release notes.
- `LICENSE-MIT` / `LICENSE-APACHE` — dual license.
- Sibling: pheno-llms-txt, pheno-prompt-test, pheno-vibecoding-guard, pheno-worklog-schema.
